## Type of Change
<!-- Check the relevant options with an x. -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 🚀 Performance improvement
- [ ] 🎨 Visual/styling changes
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] 🔧 Build/CI configuration change
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix

## Related Issues
<!-- Link to any related issues. Use "Closes #123" or "Fixes #123" to auto-close. -->
- Closes #

## Testing Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an x. -->
- [ ] `npm run build` passes with zero errors
- [ ] Changes tested in Chrome (latest)
- [ ] Changes tested in Firefox (latest)
- [ ] Changes tested in Safari (latest) (if applicable)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Fluid simulation still runs smoothly
- [ ] Text layout still flows correctly around smoke
- [ ] Mouse interaction works as expected
- [ ] Touch interaction works (if changes affect interaction)
